title: The Great Smuggler's Heist of 1905

segments.text: In 1905, a daring heist stole $1 million in gold bars.
The heist took place at the New York Customs House.
A group of smugglers executed the plan under the cover of night.
They managed to outsmart the guards and made a clean getaway.
Despite an extensive manhunt, the culprits were never caught.
The stolen gold bars have never been recovered.

visual.prompt: gold bars stacked on a table

segments.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: A bold heist in 1905 led to the theft of $1 million in gold, still missing today. Follow for daily cold cases! 💰
